abilities.description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.Upgraded: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

translation.ru_description: Порыв ветра: 1 урон и 1 Отбрасывание по линии.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Порыв ветра: 2 урона и 2 Отбрасывание по линии.
translation.en_description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

abilities.description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.Upgraded: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

translation.ru_description: Порыв ветра: 1 урон и 1 Отбрасывание по линии.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Порыв ветра: 2 урона и 2 Отбрасывание по линии.
translation.en_description: A wind gust that deals 1 damage and 1 Knockback in a line.
translation.en_upgraded_description: A wind gust that deals 2 damage and 2 Knockback in a line.

abilities.description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all adjacent units and spawning brambles.Upgraded: Explode a familiar causing damage to all units in range 2 and spawning brambles.

translation.ru_description: Взорвите фамильяра: урон соседям и создание терновника.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Взорвите фамильяра: урон в радиусе 2 и создание терновника.
translation.en_description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all adjacent units and spawning brambles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Explode a familiar causing damage to all units in range 2 and spawning brambles.

abilities.description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage.Upgraded: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage and gain Poison 1.

translation.ru_description: Создайте клетку с высокой травой, затем все враги, находящиеся на клетках с высокой травой, получают 1 урон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте клетку с высокой травой, затем все враги, находящиеся на клетках с высокой травой, получают 1 урон и получают эффект «Яд 1».
translation.en_description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Create a tall grass tile, then all enemies on grass element tiles take 1 damage and gain Poison 1.

abilities.description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP.Upgraded: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP and have their debuffs cleansed.

translation.ru_description: Создайте воду, затем все союзники на воде лечатся на 2 ОЗ.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте воду, затем все союзники на воде лечатся на 2 ОЗ и очищаются от дебаффов.
translation.en_description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Create a water tile, then all allies on water element tiles heal 2 HP and have their debuffs cleansed.

abilities.description: A melee attack. (This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Ближняя атака.
[s:.7](Стоит 0 маны. Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
A melee attack.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.Upgraded: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Призовите случайного зверя, падающего с неба на случайного врага (с уроном).
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Призовите зверя с неба на врага (с большим уроном).
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.Upgraded: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Призовите случайного зверя, падающего с неба на случайного врага (с уроном).
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Призовите зверя с неба на врага (с большим уроном).
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Summon a random animal that falls from the sky onto a random enemy, dealing more damage.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

abilities.description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.Upgraded: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту Повышение Всех Хар-к. Вы получаете Снижение Всех Хар-к.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте юниту Повышение Всех Хар-к, Заряд 2 и лечение 2. Вы получаете Снижение.
translation.en_description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

abilities.description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.Upgraded: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту Повышение Всех Хар-к. Вы получаете Снижение Всех Хар-к.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте юниту Повышение Всех Хар-к, Заряд 2 и лечение 2. Вы получаете Снижение.
translation.en_description: Give a unit All Stats Up. You get All Stats Down.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give a unit All Stats Up, Charge 2, and heal them 2. You get All Stats Down.

abilities.description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.Upgraded: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

translation.ru_description: Исцелите всех союзников и дайте им +1 Временный Урон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Исцелите всех союзников и дайте им +2 Временный Урон.
translation.en_description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

abilities.description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.Upgraded: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

translation.ru_description: Исцелите всех союзников и дайте им +1 Временный Урон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Исцелите всех союзников и дайте им +2 Временный Урон.
translation.en_description: Heal all allies and give them +1 Temporary Damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Heal all allies and give them +2 Temporary Damage.

abilities.description: Jump on a unit, damaging and displacing it.Upgraded: Jump on a unit, damaging, displacing and inflicting Bleed 1 to it.

translation.ru_description: Прыгните на юнита, нанося урон и смещая его.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Прыгните на юнита, нанося урон, смещая и накладывая Кровотечение 1.
translation.en_description: Jump on a unit, damaging and displacing it.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Jump on a unit, damaging, displacing and inflicting Bleed 1 to it.

abilities.description: Heal 2 HP and gain Charge 2.Upgraded: You and allies within 3 tiles gain 2 HP and 2 Charge.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Вы и союзники в радиусе 3 получаете 2 ОЗ и 2 Заряда.
translation.en_upgraded_description: You and allies within 3 tiles gain 2 HP and 2 Charge.

abilities.description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its second turn.Upgraded: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its first turn.

translation.ru_description: Бросьте яйцо. Если попадет в пустую клетку, оно вылупится в случайного зверя в начале своего 2 хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Бросьте яйцо. Если попадет в пустую клетку, оно вылупится в случайного зверя в начале своего 1 хода.
translation.en_description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its second turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Throw an egg. If the egg lands in an empty tile, it hatches into a random animal friend at the start of its first turn.
